allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import cv2; print\(cv2.__version__\); print\([x for x in dir\(cv2\) if 'racker' in x]\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import cv2; print\(hasattr\(cv2, 'legacy'\)\); print\([x for x in dir\(cv2.legacy\) if 'racker' in x] if hasattr\(cv2, 'legacy'\) else 'no legacy'\)")
